titles.title: Lord Take up Your Holy Throne

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord take up Your holy Throne Deep within my heart Take the place that is Yours alone Deep within my heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And of the increase of Your government There shall be no end There shall be no end There shall be no end You are worthy Lord to reign

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord take up Your holy Throne throughout all this land Take the place that is Yours alone throughout all this land

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord take up Your holy Throne throughout all the earth Take the place that is Yours alone throughout all the earth

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And of the increase of Your government There shall be no end There shall be no end There shall be no end You are worthy Lord… You are worthy Lord… You are worthy Lord… to reign…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord Take Up Your Holy Throne…
